titleStmt.title: SII 16.79: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 79. (A.R. No. 403 of 1926.) KATTERAGAṆḌLA, BADVEL TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the compound of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1448 (current), Pārthiva, Pushya śu. 15, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1525 A.D., December 29 (Friday).

It registers the grant of several taxes such as nalleddu, achchu-virāḷālu, etc., and the ubhayamārga-suṅkam payable on merchandise by the merchants to the temple of Chennakēśava at Katrakaṁḍla, in addition to confirming the former grant of lands to the same in Chennavaram and Katrakaṁḍla by Avasaram Dēmarasu for the merit of Annāji Ayyaṁgāru. The grant was executed by Veṅgaḷayya, the Kāryakartta of Annāji-Ayya and the son of Cherivūri Kṛishṇayya. Katragaṇḍla, stated to be situated in Sakali-sīma in Gaṇḍikōta-durgam, was conferred on the donor by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁ
bbulu . 1448 . Agunēṭi pārthivasaṁvatsara puṣya śu
15 lu śrīmatu Aṁnnāji Ayyavāri kāryakartalaina ce
rivūri kriṣṇayya koḍuku veṁgaḷeyyaṁgāru katterakaṁ
ḍla caṁnnakēsvaradēvuniki yiccina dharmmaśāsanakrama me
ṭlaṁnnanu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇarāyadēvamahārāyalu ratna
śiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthvīrājyaṁ śēstānu Avasa
raṁ dēmarusayyaṁgārki svāmi pāliṁccina gaṁḍḍikō
ṭa durgānku cellē sakali sīmalōnu katrakaṁḍlalōnu dēvuni
ki pūrvāna cellē ceṁnnavaraṁnkatrakaṁḍlanu pūrvānagala cēnu
maḍinni dēvuni Amurtapaḍlaku Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālkun sā
giṁcci dēvunki Akaṁḍa tiruvaḷikeku ceṁnnavarāna nagari vārki na
lledduyalkuku Accuvirānniṁnni suṁkkaravārki peṭṭē grāmakaṭnaṁ
sāhajaṁpaṁnu gānuga stavarālu ṁkraṁstāvarālun para .
staḷaṁ gavuralu yēmisarakutecci Ā grāmāna Aṁmmina ko
ṁnna dēvuniki vubhayamārgasuṁkala peṭṭeṁṭṭugānu sāgiṁ sti
mi Avasaraṁ dēmarusu Annāji Ayyaṁgārki puṇyaṁgānu sō
magrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁdu Āccaṁdrārkasthāyigānu
sūryacaṁdrādulu kalaṁtakālaṁ sarvamānyaṁgānu
dhāravōsi yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ yi puṇyānaku sīma pā
rupatyaṁ sēsē vārunun Atikāri rācakāraṇālu suṁkamaṇi
yagāṁḍlu reḍlu karaṇālu yavvaru tappinānu gaṁgakaru
tanu gōvu brāhmani vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvuvāru tama
talli taṁḍrulanu vānarāsilōnu vadhiṁccina dōṣāna pōvuvā
ru tama celleṁḍlaku tappinavāru ṣāṇakamāvusaṁ surānu
sēviṁcivāru . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pā
lanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . maṁgaḷa
mahāśrīśrī jēyunu . śrīmatu pōrumāmiḷa vōbuḷō
ju vīrākhattuṁni koḍku Ōbuḷōju śēsina sāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
